race_name: Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under)

top_categories.workout_context: 69ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under)'s demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before January.
At mile 60 of 85, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under), surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under). Train it until it feels boring.
Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under)'s sealed road through Adelaide Hills with forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 85 miles.
5,906ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
5,906ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,906ft of climbing on sealed road through Adelaide Hills with does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 85 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 85 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Tempo is Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under)'s race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 85 miles on sealed road through Adelaide Hills with. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Adelaide Epic Ride (Santos Tour Down Under)’s 85 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 85 miles of sealed road through adelaide hills with categorised climbs in Adelaide, South Australia, Australia.
